validation.redactionBoundary: synthetic read-only approval review-preflight validator fixtures only; no real validation receipt, private approval packet path, raw account, operator, evidence, revocation plan, credential, provider payload, order payload, token, app key, app secret, execution, fill, or order confirmation content

promotionRules: future review requires an explicit owner-supplied read-only approval validation-result receipt path
future review must validate the receipt with the local receipt validator before approval import review
future review cannot record the private approval packet path, raw packet values, owner name, evidence, or revocation plan
future review success still does not import approval evidence or authorize provider calls
future review success still does not enable runtime routes, UI, DB writes, orders, or live trading
